variants.title: HiFi Filter SA 16716 Air Filter
variants.description: Genuine HiFi Filter SA 16716 Air Filter. Easy to install and replace, the SA 16716 is built to withstand demanding environments, offering long-lasting protection and reliability. Whether used in automotive, agricultural, construction, or industrial applications, this filter is an essential component for maintaining system health and performance.

variants.title: Fleetguard AF26345 Air Filter, Primary | Replaces the HiFi Filter SA 16716
variants.description: Fleetguard® OptiAir™ AF26345 primary air element addresses key design requirements of all equipment manufacturers while outperforming conventional radial seal designs. Resulting in extended service intervals, reduced downtime, and lower maintenance costs.
